releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.0.6

新功能
- MySQL 工作台结果表支持右键菜单（复制单元格/行/表）
- MySQL 工作台 SQL 编辑器支持拖拽调整高度
- MySQL 工作台结果表列头悬停显示列类型和注释
- 系统托盘图标悬停显示应用名称提示
- 应用数据存储在安装目录而非 AppData

修复
- 数据库连接添加超时处理和错误显示
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.0.6

New Features
- MySQL workspace result table supports right-click context menu (copy cell/row/table)
- MySQL workspace SQL editor supports draggable resize
- MySQL workspace result table header hover shows column type and comment tooltip
- System tray icon hover shows app name tooltip
- App data stored in install directory instead of AppData

Fixes
- Added timeout handling and error display for database connections
